holdings.infoBox: ANEW is an equity ETF with a total of 148 individual holdings. The top holdings are Givaudan stock at 2.22%, Eli Lilly and Company at 2.15%, DoorDash at 2.14%, Symrise AG at 2.12%, and Danaher at 2.11%.

overview.description: The ProShares MSCI Transformational Changes ETF (ANEW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global stocks that benefit from transformational changes in peoples work, health care, consumption, and connection. ANEW was launched on Oct 14, 2020 and is issued by ProShares.
